_comment: Editable dashboard description layer. The server reloads this on each request. Labels, colors, and descriptions apply without code changes. Datasets/columns/tiers missing from config surface as config_warnings and '⚠ missing config' in the UI.
_sources_note: A dataset is a first-class concept. Register a source here, provide photos + GT, and ingest fills remaining columns. owner/source_type set provenance and the default confidence tier.

linkedspaces.label: Real-user visits
linkedspaces.desc: Real place visits from users (In Seo export, KS2-10).

union-city.label: Woohyuk personal blog
union-city.desc: Union City travel blog. Photos live under union-city-trip/ (often nested photos/).

poi-dataset-20260708.label: POI dataset 2026-07-08
poi-dataset-20260708.desc: 100-row curated eval set (ingested 2026-07-08). Mixed NA travel photos; photos under poi-dataset-20260708-photos/.

_signals_note: Auto-fill signal registry. Drives the rerun step dropdown on tab ④ and /api/datasets signal coverage. step maps to STEP_REGISTRY in server.py. status 'not_implemented' greys out the UI and returns 501.

gt_mapkit.label: MapKit canonical name (GT)
gt_mapkit.desc: Label form vs MapKit nearby names within 250m (same wide probe set).

_confidence_note: Confidence tiers change how a row is used in scoring. Raw gt_confidence stays in the CSV; confidence_rollup maps it to four canonical tiers. Label provenance is metadata, not a tier.

user_selected.desc: User-confirmed ground truth (in-app selection or verbal confirm). Headline match rate uses this tier only.

confident.desc: Trusted labels we hold (strong content evidence, synthetic naming, context). Not user-confirmed; regression anchors only, not headline metrics.

non_poi.desc: Not a POI (in-flight, transit, etc.). Correct action is reject. Used to measure model hallucination.

unresolved.desc: Cannot pin a single GT (unconfirmed or conflicting candidates). Hard cases no one can fully resolve.

schema_groups.desc: EXIF GPS coordinates. Present on every row.
On-device Vision OCR text from the photo.
S3 URL + local filename. Inputs for FastVLM and OCR.
Capture time. Kept in our set; may be missing in some exports.
User raw input (pre-provider normalization).
MapKit canonical GT for non-Korea rows = scoring reference.
Kakao canonical GT for Korea rows = scoring reference (holdout until Kakao data is available).
Label confidence tier (see confidence_tiers).
POI type. Used for failure taxonomy.
Reverse-geocode strings from the export.
Rank of the GT in the current MapKit search results.
Nearest MapKit result within ~250 m.
Candidate count in the wide MapKit radius.
Distance (m) to the matched POI.
Title the app would have shown (e.g. "Near Downtown").
Keyword used to find the GT in MapKit results (e.g. Safeway).
Match detail / notes (sparse).
Source, author, free-form notes.
Processing completion flags (separate from detection).
<s>Strong vision captions</s> — removed (circular; intentional 0%).
